message: frankenpandas-sj0 add golden conformance report fixtures

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+CI PIPELINE: FAILED (1/2 gates passed)
+  [PASS] G3: Unit Tests (100ms)
+  [FAIL] G6: Conformance (200ms)
+         2 fixtures failed
+         - case_a: value drift

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+FAIL FP-P2C-001::series_add_strict [SeriesAdd/Strict]
+  Class:    value_critical
+  ReplayKey: FP-P2C-001/series_add_strict/strict
+  Trace:    FP-P2C-001:series_add_strict:strict
+  Mismatch: expected Int64(10), got Float64(10.0)
+  Replay:   cargo test -p fp-conformance -- series_add_strict --nocapture
+  Artifact: artifacts/phase2c/FP-P2C-001/mismatch.json

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+FAILURES: 2/5 fixtures failed
+
+  1. FAIL FP-P2C-001::case_a [SeriesAdd/Strict]
+  Class:    value_critical
+  ReplayKey: FP-P2C-001/case_a/strict
+  Trace:    FP-P2C-001:case_a:strict
+  Mismatch: value drift
+  Replay:   cargo test -- case_a
+  2. FAIL FP-P2C-002::case_b [IndexAlignUnion/Hardened]
+  Class:    shape_critical
+  ReplayKey: FP-P2C-002/case_b/hardened
+  Trace:    FP-P2C-002:case_b:hardened
+  Mismatch: shape mismatch
+  Replay:   cargo test -- case_b
+  Artifact: path/to/corpus.json
+
+GATE FAILURES:
+  - FP-P2C-001: strict_failed > 0
